narrative: Middle East escalation drives a geopolitical risk premium as reports of strikes on Iran and the UAE lift the dollar — gold lower -2.43% near $4,532; equities -0.46%; DXY +0.35%; VIX 18.8. USD/JPY firms to 157.23 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets regional tension, while AUD/USD retreats to 0.7171 ahead of the RBA. Fed's Williams trimming GDP forecasts adds to the hawkish USD backdrop. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC for AUD direction.
